## 📚 Documentation Update

**Scope:**

- [ ] README / Wiki
- [ ] API Documentation (Swagger/JSDoc)
- [ ] Architecture diagrams
- [ ] Inline code comments

**Summary of Changes:**

_What was updated and why is this information important for other developers or users?_

**Checklist:**

- [ ] I have checked for spelling and grammar.
- [ ] Links and references are valid.

**Related Issue:**

- Closes #
